prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ARIMA', seasonality_champion='NaiveSeasonal', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.5731) and significant seasonality variance (0.6701), with ARIMA leading trend tracking while NaiveSeasonal excels at seasonal capture. The early/late horizon specialists differ substantially, but the combination of high disagreement and high seasonality variance strongly supports DBA combination as the optimal approach to leverage diverse model behaviors without overfitting to any single pattern.

The early/late horizon specialists differ substantially, but the combination of high disagreement and high seasonality variance strongly supports DBA combination as the optimal approach to leverage diverse model behaviors without overfitting to any single pattern."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.5731) and significant seasonality variance (0.6701), with ARIMA leading trend tracking while NaiveSeasonal excels at seasonal capture. The early/late horizon specialists differ substantially, but the combination of high disagreement and high seasonality variance strongly supports DBA combination as the optimal approach to leverage diverse model behaviors without overfitting to any single pattern.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong per-horizon model variation, favoring best_per_horizon_by_validation and topk_mean_per_horizon_k3. relative_spread_mean=0.31 (≥0.25) signals high disagreement, supporting dba_combination and robust_trimmed_mean_0.20 for stability. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination due to rmse_spread_ratio=0.5731 and seasonality_corr_variance=0.6701. With n_windows=3 (very few), small top_k=3 and shrinkage=0.35 prevent overfitting. FT_rf (RMSE=3924) vs NaiveSeasonal (RMSE=5834) shows large performance gap, justifying inverse_rmse_weights for model diversity.
